landing.heroTitle: What happens at school no longer stays only at school.
landing.heroSubtitle: The all-in-one link between administration, teachers, parents, and students. Full visibility on grades, homework, and school bus location for shared peace of mind.
landing.heroMockupAlt: NewGee app on a smartphone with GPS map and grade overview
landing.parentsTitle: Stop wondering where they are. Know it.
landing.parentsText: Track the school bus location in real time and get a notification as soon as your child reaches their destination.
landing.parentsMockupAlt: Interactive map with school bus marker
landing.teachersText: Simplify your day: take attendance, enter grades, and send homework right from your phone. Your classes are always at hand.
landing.adminTitle: NewGee: your school’s handbook, finally made simple.
landing.adminText: Set up payment schedules, track overdue fees, and share important dates (meetings, events) with the whole community in an instant.
landing.scanTitle: Technology at the service of their safety.
landing.scanText: With a unique QR code and student ID, staff instantly verify bus or cafeteria eligibility—even if a physical card is lost.
landing.eventsText: Meetings, celebrations, and key dates: reach the whole community in one place from the platform.
landing.pricingText: Plans that fit your school. Contact us for a demo and a tailored quote.
landing.aboutText: NewGee connects administration, teachers, parents, and students on one platform built for transparency and everyday peace of mind.
landing.ctaBandSubtitle: Register your school and give everyone clear visibility into school life.
landing.footerTagline: The all-in-one link for your school.
landing.footerSocialHint: Follow us on our professional pages (links to be configured).
landing.footerCguBloc: Full terms will be published here. Questions: contact@newgeeacademy.com
landing.footerLegalBloc: Publisher information: contact contact@newgeeacademy.com for details.

classGroups.title: Class groups
classGroups.subtitle: Create groups like 5ème A, 5ème B with a fixed number of students. Then assign them to courses.
classGroups.empty: No class groups yet. Create one to assign to courses.
classGroups.createDesc: Set the group name (e.g. 5ème A) and the number of students. You will assign this group to a course when creating the course.
classGroups.name: Group name

courses.createDesc: Assign a class group to a subject and teacher. The number of students comes from the class group.
courses.assignClassGroupHelp: Select the class group; name and capacity will be set automatically.
courses.addStudentsOnCreateDesc: Optionally select students to enroll when the course is created.
courses.noStudentsInSystem: No students in the system. Create students first: Faculty → Create → Role: Student.

auth.createAccountDesc: Create an account to get started.

school.registerDesc: Enter your login details then your establishment information.
school.panelSubtitle: Complete each section in the panel. You can jump between sections anytime.

subjects.title: Subjects
subjects.subtitle: Quick access to essential metrics and management tools.
subjects.createDesc: Provide the required information below to add a subject.

classes.title: Classes
classes.subtitle: Manage and organize all classes.
classes.createDesc: Provide the required information below to add a class.
classes.subject: Subject

users.title: Faculty
users.subtitle: Quick access to essential metrics and management tools.
users.createUserDesc: Add a student or a teacher.
users.name: Name

enrollments.title: Join Classes
enrollments.subtitle: Browse available classes and join using the class code provided by your teacher
enrollments.howToJoinSteps: Click on any class card to view details, then click the "Join Class" button and enter the class code. You can also join directly from the card by clicking the join button.
enrollments.noActiveClassesDesc: There are currently no active classes available to join.
enrollments.createEnrollmentDesc: Select a class and a student to create an enrollment.

joinClassModal.title: Join Class
joinClassModal.enterCode: Enter the 6-character invite code provided by your teacher to join the class.
joinClassModal.classFull: You can no longer join. This class is full.
joinClassModal.codeHint: The code is case-insensitive and should be 6 characters long
joinClassModal.invalidCode: Please enter a valid 6-character invite code
joinClassModal.unableToIdentify: Unable to identify user. Please try logging in again.
joinClassModal.invalidInviteCode: Invalid invite code. Please check and try again.
joinClassModal.classNotFound: Class could not be loaded. Try again.
joinClassModal.classNotAccepting: This class is not accepting new students.
joinClassModal.failedToJoin: Failed to join class. Please try again.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Quick access to essential metrics and management tools.
dashboard.springRegistrationMessage: Registration for Spring 2026 semester begins next Monday. Ensure all faculty have updated course schedules.
dashboard.numberStudentsPerClassTop12: Number of students in each class (Top 12)
dashboard.numberClassesPerSubject: Number of classes offered for each subject

announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.subtitle: Create and manage announcements.
announcements.createDesc: Write an announcement for the school.

studentDashboard.allEnrolledClasses: All classes you're currently enrolled in

classShow.instruction1: Ask your teacher for the invite code.

addStudentsModal.description: Select one or more students to enroll in this class.
addStudentsModal.noStudentsAvailable: No students available to add (all are already enrolled).
addStudentsModal.noStudentsInSystem: No students in the system. Create students first: Faculty → Create → choose Role: Student.
